asset_set: Debt Syndicate Quest - Strong CFO Dragon Battle
style: late-16-bit console JRPG inspired, original assets

files.battle_mockup_reference.png: Full battle-screen reference. Use only as visual target, not as final static game screen.
files.battle_bg_meeting_room.png: Clean battle background without characters/UI. Use as background layer.
files.hero_pose_sheet.png: Hero pose sheet. Cursor can either use the full sheet as reference or crop into separate sprite frames.
files.cfo_dragon_pose_sheet.png: CFO dragon enemy pose sheet. Cursor can crop idle/attack/damage poses from this sheet.
files.portraits_hero_cfo.png: Portrait sheet for hero and CFO dragon. Use/crop for battle UI portraits.

recommended_canvas.display: scale to fit browser, image-rendering: pixelated

notes: Do not ask Cursor to draw characters from scratch.
Use these PNGs as source art.
First build one battle prototype only.
Later, crop sprites manually or with drawImage source rectangles.
